title: Brand New: Creepers
description: A Brand New look for the most iconic face in the game
body:
## Welcome to...
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc6dc77d315678b3abb524de67e85576601888d3.png)
*New update coming on 04/??/26*
### About
> This texture pack gives the Creepers a **Brand New** look that changes depending on the biome!

*The gallery section is incomplete. Next update will include new pictures for all the variants.*

### Important
> This texture pack requires [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) in order to work.

### Compatibility
> Compatibility with Fresh Animations is uncertain. But other texture packs like Bare Bones and Programmer Art Fix may get texture support in the future! (but nothing confirmed, just a *maybe*)

### You can see other things I do here:
[My socials](https://dhudizi.carrd.co/)
